title: Crispy Ravioli with Italian-Style Teque Sauce
description: A creative twist on traditional ravioli with a crispy exterior and a rich, Italian-inspired teque sauce.
instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the ravioli according to package instructions.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
4. Add the teque sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
5. Fry the cooked ravioli in the skillet until crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Remove the ravioli from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
7. Season the teque sauce with salt to taste.
8. Serve the crispy ravioli with the teque sauce spooned over the top and garnished with crushed crispy.
